lens.focal_length_mm: interchangeable, Micro Four Thirds mount (ships with M.Zuiko Digital ED 17mm PRO and/or 45mm PRO lenses)

field_of_view_deg: 52 horizontal / 39 vertical / 65 diagonal (17mm lens); 21.6 horizontal / 16.2 vertical / 27 diagonal (45mm lens)
features: Four Thirds format 10MP sensor with interchangeable Micro Four Thirds mount (not a 1" sensor or C/CS mount as previously stored -- both were wrong)
ships with Olympus/OM System M.Zuiko Digital ED PRO lenses (17mm and/or 45mm, both F1.2)
optional weatherproof outdoor case rated IPX5; no IP rating without it
no IR illuminator/night-vision spec confirmed -- relies entirely on the attached interchangeable lens and sensor low-light performance

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
